title: Questcraft Horror Pack
description: A VR Horror Modpack Designed For Questcraft.
body:
The QuestCraft Horror Pack is a horror modpack designed to be used on the Meta Quest App Questcraft which allows you to play Minecraft Java standalone on Quest headsets. The modpack uses Kilt to add Forge horror mods like The Broken Script, OOO.Jar From The Caves, The End Of Herobrine, The Knocker, Sanity Descent Into Madness, and Inside The System. This modpack includes:
000.Jar
Cave Dweller Reimagined 
From The Caves
From The Fog
In Your World
Inside The System
LambDynamicLights
Sanity Descent Into Madness
Sound Physics Remastered
The Broken Script
The End Of Herobrine
The Knocker
